SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.model

Class SalesforceAddressRecord

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.SalesforceAddressRecord
public class SalesforceAddressRecord extends Object
Represents a single Salesforce Opportunity record as fetched by the address pipeline. Part of the address pipeline — produced by SalesforceClientImpl via a SOQL query against the Opportunity object. Only the address-related fields and the opportunity ID are carried here; no other opportunity metadata is stored. The quality field is populated by AddressQualityService and drives which lookup maps the record is placed into during pipeline execution.

  • Constructor Details

    • SalesforceAddressRecord

      public SalesforceAddressRecord()
      Constructs an empty record.

  • Method Details

    • getOpportunityId

      public String getOpportunityId()
      Returns the Salesforce Opportunity ID.
      Returns:
      18-character Opportunity ID, or null if not set

    • setOpportunityId

      public void setOpportunityId(String opportunityId)
      Sets the Salesforce Opportunity ID.
      Parameters:
      opportunityId - 18-character Opportunity ID

    • getRawAddress

      public String getRawAddress()
      Returns the composite raw address string.
      Returns:
      raw address assembled from all address components, or null if not set

    • setRawAddress

      public void setRawAddress(String rawAddress)
      Sets the composite raw address string.
      Parameters:
      rawAddress - raw address assembled by the client during parsing

    • getAddressLine

      public String getAddressLine()
      Returns the street address line from Salesforce.
      Returns:
      street address line, or null if not set

    • setAddressLine

      public void setAddressLine(String addressLine)
      Sets the street address line.
      Parameters:
      addressLine - street address line from the Salesforce compound address field

    • getCity

      public String getCity()
      Returns the city component of the address.
      Returns:
      city name, or null if not set

    • setCity

      public void setCity(String city)
      Sets the city component.
      Parameters:
      city - city name

    • getState

      public String getState()
      Returns the state code component of the address.
      Returns:
      two-letter state code, or null if not set

    • setState

      public void setState(String state)
      Sets the state code component.
      Parameters:
      state - two-letter state code

    • getPostalCode

      public String getPostalCode()
      Returns the postal code component of the address.
      Returns:
      ZIP or postal code, or null if not set

    • setPostalCode

      public void setPostalCode(String postalCode)
      Sets the postal code component.
      Parameters:
      postalCode - ZIP or postal code

    • getCountryCode

      public String getCountryCode()
      Returns the country code component of the address.
      Returns:
      ISO country code, or null if not set

    • setCountryCode

      public void setCountryCode(String countryCode)
      Sets the country code component.
      Parameters:
      countryCode - ISO country code

    • getNormalizedAddress

      public String getNormalizedAddress()
      Returns the normalized composite key used for address matching.
      Returns:
      normalized key in the form ADDRESS|CITY|STATE|ZIP, or null if not yet populated

    • setNormalizedAddress

      public void setNormalizedAddress(String normalizedAddress)
      Sets the normalized composite key.
      Parameters:
      normalizedAddress - normalized key produced by the pipeline

    • getSourceSystem

      public String getSourceSystem()
      Returns the name of the source system that produced this record.
      Returns:
      always "Salesforce"

    • setSourceSystem

      public void setSourceSystem(String sourceSystem)
      Sets the source system name.
      Parameters:
      sourceSystem - name of the originating system

    • getQuality

      public String getQuality()
      Returns the quality classification for this record's address.
      Returns:
      "CLEAN", "PARTIAL", or "SUSPICIOUS"; null before classification runs

    • setQuality

      public void setQuality(String quality)
      Sets the quality classification.
      Parameters:
      quality - quality label assigned by AddressQualityService
